scenario.scene: Modern minimalist patio at golden hour, a low concrete planter with small ornamental grasses behind her, a folded teak deck chair to her right with a cream linen throw draped over it. Distant city skyline softly out of focus in the deep background. Warm low-angle sunlight.
scenario.outfit: Black square-neck cropped tank top, matching black mid-thigh tailored shorts, low-heeled brown leather sandals, a thin gold tennis bracelet, small gold huggie hoops. Hair down in soft beach waves. Subtle bronzy makeup with a soft glow.
scenario.pose: Standing on the patio facing the camera at a slight three-quarter angle, weight on her right leg, looking directly at the camera with a relaxed confident smile.
scenario.grip_or_placement: Right hand at chest level, thumb on the front face of the box, index and middle fingers on the back, ring and pinky tucked under, box angled slightly toward the camera so the front face catches the warm golden- hour light directly.
scenario.lighting: Strong warm golden-hour sunlight from a low angle on her right side, golden rim light across her right shoulder and right side of the box, deep amber tones across the patio, soft cool sky in the background.
scenario.palette: black tailored, warm gold, teak wood, deep amber, soft sky cool
resolves_failure_modes: strong directional warm light Step 2 matching
scenario.notes: Strong directional light is the cleanest test of Step 2 lighting hooks — golden rim is unmistakable.

step_1_output.step_1_image_prompt: A 25-year-old Mediterranean woman with sun-kissed deep-tan skin, green almond eyes, and brunette-with-blonde-balayage waves to her mid-back, captured in a candid amateur smartphone snapshot with natural skin texture and visible pores. She is wearing a black square-neck cropped tank top, matching black mid-thigh tailored shorts, low-heeled brown leather sandals, a thin gold tennis bracelet, small gold huggie hoops, hair down in soft beach waves, subtle bronzy makeup with a soft glow. She stands on a modern minimalist patio at golden hour, a low concrete planter with small ornamental grasses behind her, a folded teak deck chair to her right with a cream linen throw draped over it, distant city skyline softly out of focus in the deep background. Standing facing the camera at a slight three-quarter angle, weight on her right leg, looking directly at the camera with a relaxed confident smile. Her right hand is raised at chest level, palm facing forward and slightly toward the camera, fingers in a relaxed pinch-ready position with thumb forward and index and middle fingers behind, currently empty. Her left hand rests at her side. Strong warm golden-hour sunlight from a low angle on her right side, golden rim light across her right shoulder, deep amber tones across the patio, soft cool sky in the background. Shot on iPhone 15 Pro 35mm equivalent. Real photograph, not AI-generated, no model pose, candid moment. Golden-hour glow confident calm mood, palette of black tailored, warm gold, teak wood, deep amber, soft sky cool. Reference image is the persona — preserve her face, eye color, eye shape, brow shape, nose shape, lip shape, jaw line, and hair color exactly. Do not improvise her face.

fal_pulid_params.negative_prompt: extra limbs, deformed hands, mutated hands, bad anatomy, lowres, blurry, watermark, text, signature, extra fingers, fused fingers, distorted face, asymmetric eyes, unnatural skin texture, plastic skin, AI-generated look, model pose, perfect symmetry, smooth airbrushed skin, glossy plastic skin, illustration, 3D render, CGI, doll-like features, magazine retouching

product_slot.location_for_step_2: Right hand raised at chest level, palm facing forward and slightly toward the camera — Step 2 will composite the Alluvi box held in a pinch grip with thumb on the front face, index and middle fingers on the back, ring and pinky tucked under, box angled slightly toward the camera so the front face catches the warm golden-hour light directly across its right edge.
product_slot.approximate_position_in_frame: upper-center-right, ~40% from top, ~55% from left, at chest level

id_weight_recommendation.reasoning: id_weight at fal API cap (1.0). true_cfg at default 1.5 — medium full mid-thigh-up framing where face is mid-importance and the strong directional golden-hour light naturally flatters and stabilizes the persona's features without needing close-up amplification.

step_2_output.step_2_image_prompt: This is a precise compositing edit, NOT a regeneration. Image 1 is the locked base layer — every pixel of the woman, her face, body, pose, outfit, hair, and the entire patio scene must remain pixel-identical to Image 1. The ONLY change is adding the Alluvi Tirzepatide product packaging from Image 2 into her right hand at chest level. Her thumb presses on the front face of the box, index and middle fingers behind, ring and pinky tucked under, the box held vertically with the long side parallel to her body and the front face angled slightly toward the camera. The box should be sized realistically relative to her hand — approximately 7 inches wide, comparable to the length from her wrist to fingertips. Do not enlarge the box. Match the lighting direction, time of day, and shadow direction of Image 1 — the product is lit by the same strong warm golden-hour sunlight from a low angle on her right side, with golden rim light catching the right edge of the box and a soft shadow falling toward the lower-left. Preserve the product's natural white packaging color from Image 2 — apply only the directional lighting and shadows of Image 1, do not shift the product's base white to match the amber scene cast. The Alluvi product packaging from Image 2 must be reproduced pixel-faithfully — every text element, every color, every graphic, every gradient, every certification badge, every dimension and proportion of the box must match Image 2 exactly. Treat Image 2 as a locked product reference, not as inspiration. Maintain the exact branding, text, and graphics from Image 2 — do not hallucinate, modify, or alter the packaging label, text, or design in any way. Final reinforcement: Image 1 woman's face, body, pose, outfit, and entire patio scene must remain pixel-identical to Image 1.
